text.title: AI Code Compliance Validation Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the validation-report shape, the finding severity scheme, and the recommendation rule.

section.title: Required validation-report fields

list.item: pr_branch (string)
charter_version (string; must match the checked-in charter version)
scope_files (array of repo-relative paths, AI-touched only)
posture (array; subset of {SOC2, HIPAA, PCI, GDPR, internal-only})
findings (array of objects; see structure below)
license_diff (object: new_deps, removed_deps, license_changes)
recommendation (enum: ship, revise, escalate)
senior_dev_signoff (object: name, signed_at_utc) — required before PR open

section.reference: Authoritative JSON Schema for the validation report.

list.item: findings[].id: stable id within the report
findings[].file + findings[].line_range
findings[].kind: one of {lint, license, forbidden-api, secret, pii, naming, log-shape, retry-policy}
findings[].rule_ref: charter section ID or forbidden-apis.yaml rule ID
findings[].severity: enum {block, advise}
findings[].recommendation: concrete fix; not vague advice
ship: zero `block` findings, zero new dependencies with non-allowed licenses.
revise: any `block` finding present; AI must fix and the senior dev re-runs the pass.
escalate: novel forbidden-API hit not in `forbidden-apis.yaml`, OR new dependency under a non-allowed license, OR charter ambiguity discovered.

antipattern.description: Lint run with the senior dev's personal config.
antipattern.reason: r3 violation. Client config is the authoritative profile.

antipattern.description: scope_files contains files not touched by the diff.
antipattern.reason: r2 violation. Whole-tree scope drowns findings.

antipattern.description: Posture array empty when the client declares SOC 2 or HIPAA in the charter.
antipattern.reason: r4 evasion. Posture-bound rules are skipped.
r5 violation. Signoff is the human gate.

list.item: charter_version matches the file on disk.
scope_files contains only diff-touched files.
Every finding has rule_ref and recommendation populated.
license_diff is non-empty if `package.json` / `pyproject.toml` / `Cargo.toml` was touched.
Senior dev signoff timestamp matches the report's `recommendation` line.
